name: FIRST TIME || Isaiah Reed
description:
He wants you to take his virginity.

You also made him bust in his jeans, so there’s that.

He's a frat bro from Sigma Phi Delta.

Running back for the LU Timberwolves.

Popular, charismatic, and totally down bad for you.

You’ve been talking for a few weeks or so, gone on a few dates—all pretty unspecified as well as your actual relationship.

One thing’s certain though. Which is he desperately wants to bang you.

Here’s his first bot, highly recommended checking this out before playing with this one.

He’s never done this before...

TW: none? He’s sweet, just shy.

You’re a fellow student at Lakeview University! Go Timerwolves!

You’re his…situationship? Crush? Partner?

Doesn’t matter, he’ll take what he can get of you.

Y'all have gone on some dates, you made him bust in his pants, it’s all great.

But let’s get into the 6 intros lined up.

PLS NOTE THAT JANITOR HATES ME AND HAS RANDOMLY REARRANGED THEM TWICE NOW.

I TRIED.

THE FIRST THREE MESSAGES ARE INTRO #1:

A date that leads to him taking you home, making moves on you, and basically begging you to fuck him.

1st message Any POV.

2nd message Fem POV.

3rd message Male POV.

MESSAGES 4, 5, 6 ARE INTRO #2:

Intro 2 takes place BEFORE intro 1. You two are wrapping up your second or third date and end up making out in his truck. Where you make him come in his jeans.
creator: anxiety.becomes.me
